files.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: horizontal rail texture for a 2D game inspector rig
Primary request: old industrial guidance rail segment, cassette retro-futurist cargo dock style, edge-to-edge horizontal strip, no text
Style/medium: gritty hand-painted game sprite texture, readable when scaled down to a thin line
Composition/framing: straight-on orthographic strip, centered lane hardware and brackets, minimal perspective
Color palette: oxidized brass, dark steel, hazard amber highlights, soot, grease
Materials/textures: worn metal, rivets, welded seams, scratched paint, oil grime
Constraints: seamless-feeling horizontal strip, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark, no decorative frame
Avoid: glowing neon bars, clean sci-fi rails, glossy plastic, modern UI stripe, perspective tunnel

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: small side-view drone sprite for a 2D cargo puzzle game
Primary request: inspector surveillance drone riding a rail, chunky industrial body with central scanner lens, cassette retro-futurist
Style/medium: gritty hand-painted game sprite, simple readable silhouette for tiny on-screen size
Composition/framing: side profile, centered subject, compact shape with slight underside scanner pod
Color palette: blackened steel, burnt bronze, dusty amber scanner accents, grime
Materials/textures: scratched metal panels, rivets, bolted seams, old plastic lens, oil stains
Lighting/mood: low industrial light with subtle amber glow around scanner lens
Constraints: single drone only, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark, no background scene
Avoid: character faces, cute toy drone, glossy consumer electronics, modern sleek sci-fi, photoreal product shot
